data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding commission rules by product/service/category.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Commission rules by product/service/category', but there is no evidence provided that directly addresses this requirement. The prior steps focus on various aspects of the booking and member management processes but do not include any checks or validations related to commission rules. This indicates a gap in the coverage of the specified requirement, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
gaps: No evidence of validation for commission rules by product/service/category.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
